{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Galactic Union warships
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|There are four dozen [[Galactic Union warships]] surrounding the narrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
